name: ergonomic-bag-pack-check
description: Create a practical carry audit for a backpack, work bag, school bag, purse, tote, or messenger bag that causes discomfort, including contents, weight, fit, balance, repacking, and weekly reset steps.

inputRequirements: Bag type and how it is worn
Contents list and known or estimated weight
Must-carry constraints such as medication, safety, school, work, or accessibility needs
outputDeliverables: Weekly reset routine and one-week test plan

constraints.safetyNotice: This prompt-only skill provides practical carry organization support, not medical diagnosis or treatment. Severe pain, numbness, weakness, injury signs, or persistent symptoms should be routed to medical care or qualified professional evaluation.
